title.id: Keterbukaan Informasi: Rencana Penawaran Umum Perdana Saham
title.en: Information Disclosure: Initial Public Offering Plan

summary.id: PT Duta Firza Tbk mengumumkan rencana penawaran umum perdana saham (IPO) di Bursa Efek Indonesia sesuai ketentuan OJK.
summary.en: PT Duta Firza Tbk announces its plan for an initial public offering (IPO) on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in accordance with OJK regulations.

title.id: Penunjukan Penjamin Emisi Efek dalam Rangka IPO

summary.id: Perseroan telah menunjuk penjamin emisi efek terkemuka untuk memfasilitasi proses penawaran umum perdana saham PT Duta Firza Tbk.
summary.en: The company has appointed a leading underwriter to facilitate the initial public offering process of PT Duta Firza Tbk.

title.id: Perubahan Susunan Direksi dan Dewan Komisaris
title.en: Changes to Board of Directors and Board of Commissioners

summary.id: Rapat Umum Pemegang Saham Luar Biasa menyetujui perubahan susunan direksi dan dewan komisaris PT Duta Firza Tbk.
summary.en: The Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders approved changes to the board of directors and board of commissioners of PT Duta Firza Tbk.
